'''Grugnak''' was an elderly [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] living on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] invaded the [[City/Legends|city]]. He hated the Empire for occupying his home, and helped the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] move personnel on Cloud City after the occupation. He was often seen carrying a white case or toolbox.
